mapper.sql: id, name, process_id AS processId, type, next_steps AS nextSteps, handler_select_rule AS handlerSelectRule, handler_ids AS handlerIds ,current_user_id As currentUserId,virtual_form_code AS virtualFormCode,step_type As stepType,pid,next_id as nextId
mapper.select:
select * from wf_process_step step where step.process_id = #{processId}
AND wf_process_step.name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{search},'%')

SELECT wf_process_step.*,t_sys_user.name as currentUserName FROM wf_process_step left join t_sys_user on t_sys_user.id = wf_process_step.current_user_id WHERE wf_process_step.process_id = #{processId} and type = 'START';

SELECT wf_process_step.*,t_sys_user.name as currentUserName ,if(wf_process_step.current_user_id is not null , true ,false) as 'hasCurrentUser' FROM wf_process_step left join t_sys_user on t_sys_user.id = wf_process_step.current_user_id WHERE wf_process_step.process_id = #{processId} and type != 'START' Limit 0,1;

SELECT wf_process_step.*,t_sys_user.name as currentUserName ,if(wf_process_step.current_user_id is not null , true ,false) as 'hasCurrentUser' FROM wf_process_step left join t_sys_user on t_sys_user.id = wf_process_step.current_user_id WHERE wf_process_step.id in
#{index}

select * FROM wf_process_step WHERE wf_process_step.id in
#{ids}

SELECT wf_process_step.*,t_sys_user.name as currentUserName,t_virtual_form.form_name as formName FROM wf_process_step left join t_sys_user on t_sys_user.id = wf_process_step.current_user_id left join t_virtual_form on t_virtual_form.`code` = wf_process_step.virtual_form_code WHERE wf_process_step.id = #{id}

SELECT t_virtual_form.design_data FROM wf_process_step left join t_virtual_form on t_virtual_form.`code` = wf_process_step.virtual_form_code WHERE wf_process_step.process_id = #{processId} and wf_process_step.type = 'START' Limit 0,1;

SELECT t_virtual_form.app_design_data FROM wf_process_step left join t_virtual_form on t_virtual_form.`code` = wf_process_step.virtual_form_code WHERE wf_process_step.process_id = #{processId} and wf_process_step.type = 'START' Limit 0,1;
SELECT t_virtual_form.entity_id FROM wf_process_step LEFT JOIN t_virtual_form on t_virtual_form.`code` = wf_process_step.virtual_form_code where wf_process_step.id=#{stepId};
SELECT t_virtual_form.design_data FROM wf_process_step LEFT JOIN t_virtual_form on t_virtual_form.`code` = wf_process_step.virtual_form_code WHERE wf_process_step.id = #{stepId}
